title: koniga edentula
intro: Koniga edentula, also known as False Pimpernel, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as a natural remedy for stomach problems, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Koniga edentula include reducing inflammation, promoting digestion, and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Koniga edentula include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
